name: stockpilot-spike-0006-0007-electron-python
description: Spike for ADR 0006 (Electron-managed Python process lifecycle) and ADR 0007 (local Python transport). Evidence code, not production.
_testConcurrencyNote: Tests spawn real OS python child processes and assert on process tables; serializing (--test-concurrency=1) keeps orphan/generation assertions race-free across suites.
